verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My life was consumed And filled with anguish I realized one thing To trust in Your great Name In You Oh Lord I've taken refuge Let me never put to shame I clasped my hands to pray

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Suddenly my defenses break And all of my soul Transcending time and space You're the air I breathe And Your love so deep Lord You take my breath away Every time I try Telling You goodbye You're just simply holding me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I remember the days When I'm without You It didn't feel so right I felt so weak so blind And then I heard You Whispered softly Your promises so true Your Word so firm so pure
